reasoning: Luther Burden III was drafted in the 2nd round of the 2025 NFL Draft by the Chicago Bears, where he enters the season as the No. 3 wide receiver behind established starters (likely DJ Moore and Rome Odunze) and is competing for targets in a crowded offense. First-round drafted QBs, RBs, and WRs generally dominate the Offensive Rookie of the Year (OROY) award. OROY winners are typically heavy volume focal points of their offense, which is highly unlikely for a 2nd round rookie WR3 facing a steep NFL learning curve (as noted by the Bears' offensive coordinator). Without evidence of a historic, unprecedented breakout by mid-season 2025, his probability of winning OROY is at the absolute floor.
batch_queries: Will Luther Burden be the 2025-2026 NFL Offensive Rookie of the Year?
